description: CompositionRed manchester united jersey from nike made of 100% recycled polyester Dri-Fit fabric, has long sleeves with slit opening at the cuffs, Manchester United seal appliquéd on the upper left chest, swoosh logo printed on the upper right chest and panel stitch along the torso and sleevesFitComfortWash careMachine was coldWash separately with like coloursDo not use softenersDo not allow to lay on itself when wetDo not bleach, iron, dry cleanDress for greatness with the Manchester United football Club soccer jersey from nike. This jersey pays homage to the incredibly successful team with strong design details like the team colours and club badge. The Dri-FIT performance fabric ensures breathability and comfort on and off the field. This sweat-wicking Dri-FIT fabric is made from 100% recycled polyester meaning the production of this jersey has minimal environmental impact. Team this with jeans and a tee for a trip to a football match or for casual outings.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
